title: 日本ダービーの後に・まばゆい背中

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin comes out on top at the Japanese
Derby, but she collapses from sheer exhaustion
after the fierce race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket and Biwa Hayahide visit her
afterward and are relieved to see that she's okay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They each declare their intent to win the final
race in the Triple Crown tour—the Kikuka
Sho—and depart from the room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket and Biwa Hayahide's
overwhelming determination leaves Narita Taishin
in awe.
